---
title: "Datasets overview"
root: ".."
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

This page provides a searchable view of the dataset catalog used by the Interactive Explorer.

::: {.callout-note}
The catalog in `data/datasets.json` ships with **placeholder starter entries**.
Replace them with your own curated, validated inventory (as exhaustive as possible).
:::

<div class="dataset-controls" aria-label="Dataset filters">
  <input id="datasetFilter" type="search" placeholder="Search datasets (name, description, notes)…" />
  <select id="modalityFilter" aria-label="Filter by modality">
    <option value="all">All modalities</option>
    <option value="neuroimaging">Neuroimaging</option>
    <option value="genetics">Genetics</option>
    <option value="proteomics">Proteomics</option>
    <option value="exposomics">Exposomics</option>
  </select>
</div>

<div class="small-muted" id="datasetCount"></div>

<table class="table table-sm" id="datasetsTable" data-quarto-disable-processing="true">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Name</th>
      <th>Modalities</th>
      <th>Countries</th>
      <th>Access</th>
      <th>Link</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody></tbody>
</table>

```{=html}
<script>
  window.AD_DIVERSITY_ROOT = "{{< meta root >}}";
</script>
<script src="{{< meta root >}}/assets/js/datasets-table.js"></script>
```
